items.lead: Start with the industry you've already worked in
items.detail: Operators buy from operators. Your track record is the qualification.
Missed calls, intake, follow-up — whatever visibly costs money.

items.lead: Install two tools where they actually run
items.detail: Charge for the outcome, not the seats.

items.lead: Every install surfaces the next project
items.detail: ~1 in 2 AI projects pulls through more work. It becomes a relationship.
